# QA Testing System - Project Instructions

This is a Python project for extracting questions and answers from PDFs and testing them via an API.

## Project Overview
- Extract questions and answers from PDF documents
- Export extracted data to Excel files
- Test answers via API endpoints and validate correctness
- Generate detailed test reports in Excel format

## Key Technologies
- Python 3.8+
- PyPDF2 for PDF processing
- openpyxl for Excel file handling
- requests for API calls
- python-dotenv for environment variables

## Setup Checklist
- [x] Project scaffolded
- [x] Dependencies defined in requirements.txt
- [x] Source code structure created
- [ ] Dependencies installed
- [ ] Examples/tests run
- [ ] Ready for use
